title: Israel and Hezbollah clash along Litani River — IDF pushes north, 100+ sites struck, Hezbollah fires rockets/drones
snippet: Israel's military clashed with Hezbollah along the Litani River as Israeli troops pushed further north. IDF struck 100+ Hezbollah sites across southern Lebanon and Bekaa Valley — storage facilities, command centers, observation points. Hezbollah launched rockets, artillery and exploding drone attacks on Israeli troops mobilizing along the river toward Yohmor al-Shaqif and Zawtar al-Sharqieh. The Litani has become a de facto boundary with large areas to the south under Israeli control despite the ceasefire. Over 3,185 killed and 1M+ displaced in Lebanon since March 2.
tag_reason: Litani River clashes represent new escalation — IDF pushing beyond previous line, Hezbollah counterattacking
